assertions.description: No signal analysis detected (0 signals) - SPI-like shift register chain (CLOCK, LATCH, DATA signals), motor drive outputs, and sensor input path should all be detectable
No SPI bus detection for the 74HC595/74HC165 daisy chain despite CLOCK, LATCH, DATA net names being present

REVIEW: TPL7407L components use lib_id Transistor_Array:ULN2003A - the value says TPL7407L but lib symbol is ULN2003A. Analyzer correctly reports what is in the schematic, but could note the value/lib mismatch as a design observation
